**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Nanjing Fuyi Electromechanical Equipment Co., Ltd. is a classic specimen of a miniaturized commercial proxy that was 'rigidly categorized into manufacturing by the registry system simply because its name contains "Electromechanical".' The underlying fictional Apple Inc. consumer electronics empire has been completely eradicated by the forensic engine. Although officials gave it the heavyweight tag of 'Electrical Machinery and Equipment Manufacturing,' a set of extremely sour physical data instantly knocked it back to its original form: this is a micro-enterprise with a paid-in capital of only 400,000 RMB and a 2024 insured headcount of only '2 people.' The most fatal aspect is its registered coordinates—located at 'Room 8076,' No. 282 Daming Road, Nanjing. Opening an electrical machinery manufacturing plant in an 8th-floor commercial single room? This violates basic laws of physics. Carefully examining its business license, the entire text is filled with 'sales' and 'wholesale' (such as mechanical equipment sales, hardware product wholesale, pump and vacuum equipment sales); the only weak manufacturing term is 'machining of mechanical parts and components.' Diagnostic conclusion: this is absolutely not a major electromechanical manufacturing plant, but a 'Two-Person Micro Hardware/Electromechanical Equipment Trading Proxy' opened on the 8th floor of an office building. It is highly likely that they just take second-hand orders for equipment procurement, or put a small grinder behind a desk to do extremely simple parts repair, completely lacking any industrial-grade manufacturing capability.
